meaning: adj.多种维生素的n.多种维生素剂
examples: As long as you understand that any potential benefit is modest and subject to further refinement, taking a daily multivitamin makes a lot of sense.
The researchers looked at 60 multivitamin products on sale between November 2004 and March 2005.
"Though vitamin E is important to health, we aren't suggesting people take more than a multivitamin, " said Benson.
